reason: Replace generic title with primary-service keywords to improve search visibility for lip blushing and cosmetic tattooing queries.
Rewrite meta description to include high-intent keywords (lip blushing, powder brows) and a clearer value proposition for search results.
The FAQ says free shipping over $100, but the site-wide announcement banner says free shipping over $80 — aligning the FAQ to match the banner.
Expand meta description to include compelling details (before & afters, booking CTA) that appear on the page, improving SERP click-through for the key services page.
